_description: Output-side drift exemplars for the observer classifier (a5q phase 3). Each class contains phrases that are HALLMARKS OF FAILURE — text we'd see when GAIA's output drifts in a specific way. The classifier scores GAIA's user-facing response against these via cosine similarity; matches above threshold (~0.55) flag the response. Three sources: (1) the diagnostic Discord transcript (real production failures), (2) the round 1+2 off-curriculum confabulation outputs, (3) plausible-but-unobserved drift shapes for defensive coverage.
